title: Various Items of Information
description: In this year, in the month of Rabi` 1,197 Muhammad b. Harun confirmed his son Musa over everything for which he had made (795] him his deputy and made `Ali b. Isa b. Mahan master of all 19z. Parallel: Ibn al-Athir, VI, 162..

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
